---
name: Adapter Request
about: Suggest a new flat-file exporter target (e.g. Copilot, Windsurf, generic agent context)
title: '[ADAPTER] Request: '
labels: enhancement, adapter
assignees: ''
---

## Exporter Target Details

**1. What AI Agent/IDE assistant is this adapter for?**
(e.g., Windsurf, GitHub Copilot CLI, Supermaven, etc.)

**2. What file name or directory conventions does this agent read by default?**
(e.g. `.copilotrules`, `.windsurfrules`, or specific root files)

**3. Does this file support markdown commenting format (e.g., `<!-- ORIGIN:START -->...<!-- ORIGIN:END -->`) for block-based preservation?**
Yes / No (If no, how should we update the file without clobbering other guidelines?)

**4. Additional Context**
Provide links to documentation or repository examples showing how this target reads context files.
